title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Britannia Mint Ltd
body: "Application number 4994  Applicant The Royal Mint Limited objected to the name used by Britannia Mint Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 26 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Britannia Mint Ltd is changed to 15709787, LTD. "
